info.description: Central portal API for managing systems, servers, notes, feature requests, and documentation.
info.title: Application Knowledge Management System API

post.description: Login with username and password to retrieve a Bearer token

get.description: Get the profile details of the currently authenticated user

post.description: Register a new user in the system with a specific role

400.description: error: Invalid request body / Invalid role

500.description: error: Username already exists / Database save error

get.description: Get details of a single documentation entry by ID

put.description: Update details of an existing documentation entry by ID

400.description: error: Invalid payload / Kategori tidak valid

delete.description: Delete a documentation entry from database by ID

put.description: Update details/status of an existing feature request by feature request ID

delete.description: Delete a feature request record from database by feature request ID

put.description: Update details of an existing note record by note ID

500.description: error: Gagal memperbarui catatan di database

delete.description: Delete a note record from database by note ID

get.description: Get a list of all server records
Get details of a server record by ID

put.description: Update details of an existing server record

delete.description: Delete a server record from database

get.description:
Get a list of all systems
Get a list of all systems

post.description: Create a new system database entry by providing system fields

get.description: Get detailed information of a system including server

put.description: Update details of an existing system by ID

delete.description: Delete a system record and its related notes/features from database

get.description: Get a list of documentations associated with a system ID, optionally filtered by category

post.description: Create a new documentation entry for a system

400.description: error: ID System tidak valid / Invalid payload / Kategori tidak valid

get.description: Get a list of feature requests associated with a specific system
get.summary: Get feature requests by system ID

500.description: error: Gagal mengambil data feature request

post.description: Create a new feature request for a system

400.description: error: ID System tidak valid / Invalid request body

get.description: Get a list of notes associated with a specific system

post.description:
Create a new note for a system by providing the system ID and note content
Create a new note for a system

400.description: error: ID System tidak valid / Invalid request body
